President Trump indicated a deal with Iran was close, following a 10-day truce that removes a key obstacle to negotiations. Experts anticipate continued volatility but expect prices to remain supported.

ai.title: OpenAI's $20 Billion Power Play in AI Race

This move aims to bolster OpenAI's computing capabilities in the competitive AI sector and could result in an equity stake in Cerebras, potentially increasing as spending grows.
